description: Deprecated tokens, settings, and model names to detect in auto-loaded rules files (~/.claude/rules/**/*.md, ~/.claude/CLAUDE.md, project CLAUDE.md). Each pattern is a JavaScript-compatible regex evaluated by scripts/audit.sh via Node.

patterns.message: MAX_THINKING_TOKENS env var does not apply to Opus 4.7+ (adaptive reasoning is always on).
patterns.fix: Remove references. Configure `effortLevel` in settings.json instead.

patterns.message: CLAUDE_CODE_DISABLE_ADAPTIVE_THINKING has no effect on Opus 4.7+.
patterns.fix: Remove references. Opus 4.7+ always uses adaptive reasoning regardless of this flag.

patterns.message: alwaysThinkingEnabled settings field is deprecated in Opus 4.7+.
Reference to an older Opus version (4.0-4.5). Current default is Opus 4.7.
patterns.fix: Update to `Opus 4.7` (or the latest version you use).

patterns.message: Reference to an older Sonnet version (4.0-4.5). Latest is Sonnet 4.6.
patterns.fix: Update to `Sonnet 4.6` (or the latest version you use).

patterns.message: Reference to an older Haiku version (4.0-4.4). Latest is Haiku 4.5.
patterns.fix: Update to `Haiku 4.5` (or the latest version you use).

patterns.message: Reference to Claude 3.x era model. These are legacy and may be retired.
Reference to an older Opus 4.x model ID. Current: `claude-opus-4-7`.
patterns.fix: Update to `claude-opus-4-7` (or the latest Opus 4.x ID).

maintenanceNote: Add a new pattern whenever a Claude model major version ships or a settings field is deprecated. Keep severity conservative (info for version drift, warn for actively-misleading config, fail only for active security/cost damage). See model-upgrade-checklist workflow in the main repo.
